channel.title: Wallets on Unitools
channel.description: Recent content in Wallets on Unitools

item.title: How to Create a Trust Wallet
item.description: Download only from official sources. Here are the download links for both platforms: App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/trust-ethereum-wallet/id1288339409 923 Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.wallet.crypto.trustapp Step 1 - Launch Trust Wallet Upon first launch of the app, you will be presented with the screen below which is the part where you can "Create a New Wallet" or "Import" an existing one. For this guide, we will select on Create a New Wallet. Step 2 - Accept Terms of Usage In order to proceed, you would need to accept the Terms of Usage.
